test_RequestEmergencyUnlock_AlreadyIniti.details: FIX: After first emergency request, lock status changes to EMERGENCY_PENDING,      so second request reverts with LockAlreadyReleased (checked before EmergencyAlreadyInitiated)

test_CorePrinciple_SelfCustody().notice: Test: CP-2 Self-Custody - Bond only, no locked funds kept after release

test_CorePrinciple_TimeLockExists().notice: Test: CP-3 Time Lock exists - 7 day emergency time lock

test_CorePrinciple_Transparency().notice: Test: CP-5 Transparency - All operations emit events

test_EdgeCase_MultipleEmergencyParallel(.notice: Test: Multiple emergency requests for different locks

test_EmergencyBondCalculation_Min().notice: Test: Bond calculation MIN case (0.5 ETH minimum)

test_EmergencyBondCalculation_Percent().notice: Test: Bond calculation MAX case (5% of amount)

test_EmergencyBond_ForfeitedOnValidChall.notice: Test: Bond is forfeited when challenge succeeds

test_EmergencyBond_ReturnedOnSuccess().notice: Test: Bond is returned on successful emergency unlock

test_EmergencyTimeLock_ExtendedOnChallen.notice: Test: Time lock extends when challenged

test_EmergencyTimeLock_SetCorrectly().notice: Test: 7-day time lock is set correctly

test_EmergencyUnlock_AfterTimeLock().notice: Test: Can execute after 7-day time lock

test_EmergencyUnlock_BeforeTimeLock().notice: Test: Cannot execute before 7-day time lock

test_EnhancedMonitoring_ChallengeAccepte.notice: Test: Challenge can be filed during emergency

test_RequestEmergencyUnlock_Insufficient.notice: Test: Emergency unlock rejected with insufficient bond

test_RequestEmergencyUnlock_NotOwner().notice: Test: Only lock sender can request emergency

test_RequestEmergencyUnlock_Success().notice: Test: User can request emergency unlock with bond

test_Spec_BondFormula().notice: Test: SPEC-002 Emergency Bond calculation formula

test_Spec_FullEmergencyFlow().notice: Test: SPEC-001 Sequence#3 compliance - full flow
